gestures.mdmPrompt: a tutor stands with a welcoming posture, gestures with both hands toward the colorful objects on the screen, and smiles
a person leans slightly forward, tilts their head with curiosity, and raises both hands in a questioning gesture toward the learners
a tutor steps to the side, extends one arm while tracing an imaginary line and describes creating two groups of three objects
a person gestures with one hand to the left and then to the right, emphasizing the idea of 2 groups of 3 objects with clear motions
a tutor opens both arms wide, invitingly gestures towards the screen, and encourages counting all the objects in the two groups
a person raises both hands to their chin with an inquisitive look, tilts their head slightly, and waits for responses about the total count
a tutor claps their hands together excitedly, smiles broadly, and nods encouragingly to celebrate the students' understanding of grouping
a person steps closer to the screen, spreads both arms wide again, and gestures enthusiastically to reinforce the idea of combining groups
